message:
fix(e2e): add mockApiFallback, kc-demo-mode, and addInitScript to 14 test files (#10759)

Three systemic issues caused Playwright E2E failures in CI:

1. Missing mockApiFallback — unmocked API requests hang in webkit/firefox
   when no backend is running. Added to: hourglass-audit, Missions,
   mission-regression, NamespaceOverview, UpdateSettings,
   nightly/dashboard-health, nightly/mission-deeplink,
   nightly/navigation-error-regression.

2. Missing kc-demo-mode localStorage flag — without this, the app
   waits for real backend data instead of falling back to demo mode.
   Added to: cluster-admin-cards (3 setup functions), UpdateSettings,
   hourglass-audit, Missions, mission-regression, Login (/health mock),
   mission-control-e2e, nightly/dashboard-health, nightly/mission-deeplink.

3. Wrong localStorage key (kc_demo_mode vs kc-demo-mode) — underscore
   variant is not recognized by the app. Fixed in: mission-control-dry-run,
   mission-control-stress, mission-journey.

4. page.evaluate() replaced with addInitScript — page.evaluate runs
   AFTER page scripts, too late for webkit/Safari where auth redirects
   fire synchronously. Switched to addInitScript in: hourglass-audit,
   Missions, mission-regression, NamespaceOverview, mission-control-e2e,
   nightly/dashboard-health, nightly/mission-deeplink,
   nightly/navigation-error-regression.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -345,11 +345,11 @@ async function navigateToConsole(page: Page) {
   await setupGitHubMocks(page)
   await setupAIMocks(page)
 
-  // Set demo auth token to bypass OAuth login screen
-  await page.goto('/login')
-  await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded')
-  await page.evaluate(() => {
+  // Seed localStorage BEFORE any page script runs
+  await page.addInitScript(() => {
     localStorage.setItem('token', 'demo-token')
+    localStorage.setItem('kc-demo-mode', 'true')
+    localStorage.setItem('demo-user-onboarded', 'true')
   })
   await page.goto('/')
   await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded', { timeout: DIALOG_RENDER_TIMEOUT_MS })

 /** Set up demo mode via localStorage so the app loads without a real backend */

-  await page.goto('/login')
-  await page.evaluate(() => {

     localStorage.setItem('kc-demo-mode', 'true')
     localStorage.setItem('demo-user-onboarded', 'true')
